mapper.select: SELECT IB.POST_SN , IB.INSTR_USER_ID , IB.WRTR_USER_ID , IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD , IB.POST_SJ , IB.POST_CN , IB.INQ_CNT , IB.ATCH_FILE_ID , IB.REG_DT , IB.MDFCN_DT , IB.RGTR_ID , IB.LAST_MDFR_ID , M.USER_NAME , C.COM_CD_NM AS BOARD_TYPE_NM FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON IB.WRTR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CD C ON C.CL_CODE = '100' AND C.COM_CD = IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE IB.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} ORDER BY IB.REG_DT DESC

SELECT IB.POST_SN , IB.INSTR_USER_ID , IB.WRTR_USER_ID , IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD , IB.POST_SJ , IB.POST_CN , IB.INQ_CNT , IB.ATCH_FILE_ID , IB.REG_DT , IB.MDFCN_DT , IB.RGTR_ID , IB.LAST_MDFR_ID , M.USER_NAME , C.COM_CD_NM AS BOARD_TYPE_NM FROM INSTRUCTOR_BOARD IB INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON IB.WRTR_USER_ID = M.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CD C ON C.CL_CODE = '100' AND C.COM_CD = IB.BOARD_TYPE_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE IB.POST_SN = #{postSn} AND IB.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId}
